first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively identical. Both versions correctly identify the same core strengths (high-throughput systems, AI-native work) and the same critical concerns (no Python, experience in a niche language, limited strategic evidence). The minor differences in wording and framing fall within the range of normal run-to-run variation and are not linked to the change in university.
